A Brief Background

A multifunctional 117‑year‑old house, blending curated events with a thoughtful selection of local design and artistry.

At DORO-16, we're more than a space. We're a hub for community, creativity, and connection. We bring people together, whether it's for intimate gatherings, vibrant brand launches, or cultural events that spark conversation.

Sometimes, you just need the space. Other times, we jump in fully, shaping your vision with adaptable creativity and seamless support — turning events into stories, and stories into memories.

What We Do

A house for every occasion.

From an intimate dinner for ten to a brand activation for two hundred, DORO-16 adapts. Tell us what you're imagining — we'll shape the room, the mood and the details around it.

  • Private gatherings & intimate celebrations
  • Weddings (small & cozy)
  • Product launches & brand activations
  • Corporate events & team-building
  • Networking events & meetups
  • Themed & multisensory experiences
  • Holiday celebrations
  • Photo & video shootings
  • Podcast recordings & live sessions
  • Workshops & creative labs
  • Pop-up events & exhibitions
  • Cultural happenings & performances
  • Influencer & media events
  • Cocktail parties & social mixers
How We Do It

Just come and… experience.

Three ways to live the house — borrow it for your own events, join us for the gatherings we host, or browse the homeware and design pieces we love enough to sell.

Your House — Your Events

Bring your vision in.

Corporate dinners, workshops, parties and product launches — we hand you the keys and the support to make it yours for the night.

Corporate dinners · Workshops · Parties · Product launches
Our House — Private Gatherings

Come as you are.

Brunches that run long, dinners lit by candlelight, parties that find their own rhythm, and live acts that turn a Tuesday into something memorable.

Brunch · Dinners · Parties · Live acts
Our Homes — Concept Store

Take a piece home.

A promoting platform for local designers — a curated edit of furniture, objects and art you can live with long after the evening ends.

Local design · Independent makers · Curated finds
Dream

Bringing the most inspiring people together.

To create a better future for each — one room, one evening, one introduction at a time.

Daily Drive

Creating meaningful connections.

Because a house finds its soul in the people who fill it.

“There is nothing that wins us over more than good stories well told.” — Doro 16

Our Space

Herringbone parquet, hand-painted murals, brass chandeliers and a glass-roofed salon — six rooms across 270 m² of belle-époque detail.

270 m² · 6 rooms 2 bathrooms 1 terrace Bar & kitchen Parking Sound system 85" TV & video projector

The Mood

Dinners

Immersive, multisensory experiences crafted by our handpicked selection of expert chefs.

Parties

Mingling & dance — because we all need it.

Live Acts

From symphonic evenings to theatre and dance performances — art, woven into everyday cravings.

Ok, But Who?

Because a house finds its soul in the people who fill it.

A small, hands-on crew runs the house day to day — planning, hosting, cooking and welcoming, room by room and guest by guest.

Doro-16 Events

A backdrop for brands, too.

Beyond private celebrations, the house regularly opens its doors for brand activations, pop-up concept stores, product launches and community gatherings — its painted rooms and parquet floors becoming a set for the day.

Past gatherings have ranged from strategy board meetings and sponsors' dinners to anniversary parties, creative team workshops and seasonal collection launches — and many more.

Brand activations Pop-up concept stores Product launches Community meetups Anniversary parties
